title: Photography & Art
desc: I enjoy capturing daily life, ordinary objects, and small visual details that make the world feel more meaningful.

detail.body: I enjoy photography and art because they help me notice everyday life more carefully. I like capturing daily objects, small moments, and the life around me, especially scenes from Vietnam and ordinary details that might otherwise be overlooked. Painting and photography both help me slow down, observe more deeply, and enjoy life beyond school and technical work.

media.caption: Photography of daily life and objects around me
